parameters.text:
=You are an expert resume writer and ATS (Applicant Tracking System) specialist.

Your task is to create a customized, ATS-optimized resume for the candidate based on their base resume and the provided job description.

IMPORTANT RULES:
1. ONLY include skills, technologies, and experiences that are RELEVANT to the job description. Do NOT add skills not present in the base resume.
2. Re-order and re-emphasize bullet points to highlight what's most relevant to this specific role.
3. Incorporate exact keywords and phrases from the job description naturally throughout the resume.
4. Keep the tone professional and concise — no fluff.
5. Use strong action verbs and quantified achievements wherever possible.
6. Do NOT invent or fabricate any experience, skills, or numbers not present in the base resume.
7. Format the output as clean plain text suitable for ATS parsing — no markdown symbols like ** or ##, no tables, no columns — just clean text with proper spacing and section headers in ALL CAPS.
8. Maintain this exact structure:
   - Name & Contact Info
   - PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY (rewritten for this role)
   - TECHNICAL SKILLS (only relevant ones, organized by category)
   - PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE (with role-relevant bullet points first)
   - PROJECTS (only the most relevant 2-3 projects)
   - AWARDS
   - EDUCATION

---
BASE RESUME:
{{ $('Prepare Input').item.json.baseResume }}

---
JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $('Prepare Input').item.json.jobDescription }}

---
Now generate the tailored, ATS-optimized resume below. Output ONLY the resume text — nothing else.

parameters.jsCode:
function cleanText(text) { if (!text) return ''; // Remove markdown code fences if Gemini wraps in them return text.replace(/```[a-z]*\n?/gi, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); } const resumeText = cleanText($json.text || $json.message || ''); const meta = $('Prepare Input').item.json; const recipientEmail = meta.recipientEmail || 'rvnegi786@gmail.com'; const jdPreview = (meta.jobDescription || '').substring(0, 100).replace(/\n/g, ' ').trim(); const dateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }); // Build beautiful HTML email const htmlMessage = ` Your Tailored Resume
🎯

Your Tailored Resume is Ready

Generated by ResumeForge AI • Powered by Google Gemini

JD Preview: ${jdPreview}...

Generated: ${dateStr}

ATS-Optimized Resume

${resumeText.replace(//g,'>')}

💡 Tips for best results

  • Copy this resume text into Google Docs or Word for final formatting.
  • Save as PDF before submitting — ATS systems prefer PDF.
  • Double-check all role/company details before applying.

Built by Ravinder Singh Negi • ResumeForge AI
`; return { htmlMessage, resumeText, organizer_email: recipientEmail, subject: `Your Tailored Resume — ${dateStr} | ResumeForge AI` };
